description: Cryptographically verifiable receipts of an agent's delegated work, verified offline.
name: io.github.Sequesign/sequesign

environmentVariables.description: Transport: 'direct' (default; sign locally, an independent witness co-signs) or 'managed' (route through the Sequesign broker for a registered identity).
environmentVariables.name: SEQUESIGN_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Sequesign write-class API key (from the dashboard). Required for managed mode; in direct mode it authenticates the hosted witness.
environmentVariables.name: SEQUESIGN_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Ed25519 PKCS#8 private-key PEM for the agent. In managed mode, the key registered to your API key. In direct mode, omit to mint an ephemeral key per session.
environmentVariables.name: SEQUESIGN_AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Directory where sealed receipt packages are written. Defaults to a temporary directory.
environmentVariables.name: SEQUESIGN_PACKAGE_DIR

title: Sequesign
